name: review_status
description: Check the current Monocle review status. Returns whether feedback is pending, a pause was requested, or no feedback is available.

name: get_feedback
description: Retrieve review feedback from Monocle. With wait=true, blocks until the reviewer submits feedback.

name: send_artifact
description: Send content to Monocle for the reviewer to see. Provide content directly or pass file_path to read from disk.

name: add_files
description: Add file paths to the current Monocle review session.

name: remove_files
description: Remove previously-added file paths from the current Monocle review session. Pass the same paths used with add_files.

name: set_file_groups
description: Organize the changed files in Monocle's grouped sidebar view for the reviewer. Provide entries, each with a path (matching a changed file from review_status) and optional grouping metadata: group (free-form label like "UI", "Backend", "Database" to tell the change as a top-down story), group_order (integer; lower groups shown first), sort_index (order within a group; lower first), category (one of code/test/config/docs/build to override the path heuristic), and criticality (integer; higher = more important). Order groups from entry-point to dependency (e.g. UI → API → database) so the reviewer reads the change in flow order. Set replace=true to replace all prior grouping. The reviewer presses 'f' to cycle to the grouped view.
